action.reasoning: Observation: The current attempt to use a Vision Transformer (ViT) backbone failed because it's trying to download the model from the Hugging Face Hub, which is not allowed in this environment. The error occurred during model initialization in train.py. Analysis: I need to use one of the pre-downloaded models mentioned in the task description instead of trying to download a new one. The available pre-trained models are: CLIP ViT-B/16 (86M), ResNet50 (25M), and ConvNeXt Tiny (28M). Since my previous attempts with ResNet50 didn't perform well, I'll try the CLIP ViT-B/16 model which might be better suited for this task. Decision: I'll modify the model.py to use the pre-downloaded CLIP ViT-B/16 model instead of the regular ViT, and update the train.py accordingly.
